heading: 2 All Measures
text:
Analogous Exercise Decisions lab made measure 21 item self-report questionnaire. measure assesses participants' preferences exercise alternative rewards, including monetary values, caloric amounts, snack portion sizes.##Scoring###
Breakpoints determined four categories. first category, participants completed 10 items comparing increasing monetary values 30 minutes exercise. breakpoint defined point participant first chose money exercise. second category followed procedure 10 items comparing increasing monetary values 1 hour exercise, breakpoint identified first choice money exercise. third category, participants completed 5 items increasing caloric amounts presented context much willing consume order engage 30 minutes exercise. breakpoint defined point participant first indicated longer willing consume specified caloric amount exercise. final category included 6 items assessing increasing snack portion sizes using format, breakpoint identified point participant first indicated consume specified amount order engage 30 minutes exercise.Drive Muscularity Scale 15 item questionnaire assesses

heading: Overview
text: codebook documents variables three studies — POWERED, MAXED, MR21 — grouped six conceptual categories, seventh Administrative / appendix REDCap system fields (timestamps, record IDs, form completion flags, consent/signature fields, etc.). variable tagged project(s) appears:chapter one searchable, sortable, filterable table. Use column filters top table narrow Measure Project.

heading: 3 Demographics
text: Age, sex assigned birth, gender identity, pronouns, race/ethnicity, education, household characteristics, participant background variables.

heading: 4 Anthropometric Measures
text: Height, weight, BMI, Tanner staging, pubertal development indicators.

heading: 5 Medical History
text: Medical diagnoses, surgeries, hospitalizations, medications, menstrual history, substance use, vitals, prior weight history.

heading: 6 Mental Health Diagnosis
text: Diagnostic interviews standardized symptom measures — DIAMOND, BDI-II, PHQ-9, GAD-7, RCADS, YBOCS, OCI, Columbia SSRS, DSM-5 Cross-Cutting Symptoms, MMSE.

heading: 7 Eating Disorder Behaviors
text: EDE, EPSI, ED100K / ED100K+, ED History, Drive Thinness/Muscularity, Compulsive Exercise, Exercise Dependence, ART, Goldfarb Fear Fat, Analogous Exercise Decisions, SRHI (habitual eating), post-interview target-weight survey, binge / purge / restrict / food-intake / milkshake task items visit forms.

heading: 8 Socio-behavioral
text: Anxiety, mood, emotion regulation, perfectionism, social evaluation, body image state, interoception, transdiagnostic trait / state measures — ASI, BIS/BAS, DERS, Frost MPS, IUS, Self-Compassion, SATAQ, BFNE, Perceptions Teasing, SPSRQ, FADE/FAMB, NVS, PVS, EMA, OCYC Maladaptive, Body Appreciation.

heading: Administrative / Other
text: REDCap system fields study-flow variables: survey timestamps, record IDs, form-complete flags, consent/signature fields, visit start/end times, payment records, interviewer notes. Included completeness; substantive measures.

heading: Notes & caveats
text: Mixed intake forms (DCF, DCF-Parents, Study Visit /B/C Collection Forms) split heuristically; review entries flagged Administrative / confirm none promoted substantive category.Duplicate variable names across projects collapsed single row source projects listed badges. name refers different constructs different projects, split codebook.csv rendering.Value coding reproduced source REDCap export truncated 180 chars category tables — full strings preserved codebook.csv.ART (Athletes’ Relationship Training) placed Eating Disorder Behaviors use assessing compulsive exercise ED populations.
